nasb.text: It grew up to the host of heaven and caused some of the host and some of the stars to fall to the earth, and it trampled them down.

esv.text: It grew great, even to the host of heaven. And some of the host and some of the stars it threw down to the ground and trampled on them.

cnv.text: 牠漸漸長大，高及天象，把一些天象和星星摔落在地上，用腳踐踏。

ccb.text: 它逐渐强大，高及天军，将一些天军和星宿抛到地上，用脚践踏。
